mapper.sql: id, name, goods_type_id, status, describes, img, user_id, price, inventory, warning, content, sales_volume, deposit, creat_date, score, brand, model
mapper.insert: insert into goods (id, name, goods_type_id, status, describes, img, user_id, price, inventory, warning, content, sales_volume, deposit, creat_date, score, brand, model) values (#{id}, #{name}, #{goodsTypeId}, #{status}, #{describes}, #{img}, #{userId}, #{price}, #{inventory}, #{warning}, #{content}, #{salesVolume}, #{deposit}, #{creatDate}, #{score}, #{brand}, #{model})

insert into goods
id, name, goods_type_id, status, describes, img, user_id, price, inventory, warning, content, sales_volume, deposit, creat_date, score, brand, model,
#{id}, #{name}, #{goodsTypeId}, #{status}, #{describes}, #{img}, #{userId}, #{price}, #{inventory}, #{warning}, #{content}, #{salesVolume}, #{deposit}, #{creatDate}, #{score}, #{brand}, #{model},
mapper.select:
select
from goods order by id desc

select t1.*, t2.name as t2_name, t3.name as t3_name, t3.cellphone as t3_cellphone, t3.avatar as t3_avatar from goods t1 left join goods_type t2 on t1.goods_type_id = t2.id left join user t3 on t1.user_id = t3.id where t1.status = 1 order by t1.${field} ${sort} limit #{limit}

select t1.*, t2.name as t2_name, t3.name as t3_name, t3.cellphone as t3_cellphone, t3.avatar as t3_avatar from goods t1 left join goods_type t2 on t1.goods_type_id = t2.id left join user t3 on t1.user_id = t3.id where t1.${field} = ${value} and t1.status = 1 order by t1.id desc

select t1.*, t2.name as t2_name, t3.name as t3_name, t3.cellphone as t3_cellphone, t3.avatar as t3_avatar from goods t1 left join goods_type t2 on t1.goods_type_id = t2.id left join user t3 on t1.user_id = t3.id where t1.id = #{id}
select t1.name as name, count(t2.goods_type_id) as value from goods_type t1 left join goods t2 on t1.id = t2.goods_type_id group by t2.goods_type_id order by t1.id desc
select t1.name as name, sum(t2.quantity) as value from goods t1 left join goods_orders t2 on t1.id = t2.goods_id where t2.status = 4 group by t1.id order by t1.id desc
select t1.name as name, sum(t2.money) as value from goods t1 left join goods_orders t2 on t1.id = t2.goods_id where t2.status = 4 group by t1.id order by t1.id desc
select t1.name as name, sum(t2.duration) as value from goods t1 left join goods_orders t2 on t1.id = t2.goods_id where t2.status = 4 group by t1.id order by t1.id desc
select t1.name as name, count(t2.goods_id) as value from goods t1 left join repair t2 on t1.id = t2.goods_id group by t1.id order by t1.id desc
select t1.id as count, count(t2.goods_id) as value from goods t1 left join goods_orders t2 on t1.id = t2.goods_id where t2.user_id = #{userId} group by t1.id order by t1.id asc
